text_original: honestly, it was a good app until the new models rolled out and the pay per message even for lifetime members came out. I'm definitely going to be canceling my annual subscription because the bot seems broken entirely now unless you use the pay per chat.
text_zh: 说实话，在推出新模型以及连终身会员都要按消息收费之前，这确实是一款挺好的应用。我肯定会取消我的年度订阅，因为现在除非你使用按次付费聊天，否则这个机器人似乎完全废了。
reply_original: I'm so sorry for the frustration. VIP members are entitled to unlimited chats and should never be charged per message. This sounds like a system sync bug with the new models. Please email support@fantachat.ai with your UID so we can investigate and fix this for you immediately. We want to make this right!
reply_zh: 非常抱歉给您带来困扰。VIP会员享有无限聊天额度，绝不应该按消息收费。这听起来像是新模型的系统同步Bug。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 并附上您的 UID，以便我们立即为您调查并修复此问题。我们希望能为您妥善解决！
